docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOFF, ALAN D DBA JOY INVESTMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT COUGHLIN, DAVID W DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED
